raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a {$5800.00} business class flight to XXXX on XX/XX/year>, using my American Express card. Due to escalating geopolitical unrest and safety concerns in the XXXX XXXX ( my transit route ), I canceled the trip before traveling. 

American Express refunded only {$4300.00} but withheld approximately {$1500.00} without a valid explanation. The original charge no longer appears on my account, making it difficult to track. I submitted a formal dispute through the Amex app, but my appeal was denied. 

I did not travel or receive any part of the service and am seeking assistance to recover the withheld funds. I believe American Express has not honored their cardholder protection policies regarding this charge.
